rag_rules: When fixing 'Couldn't resolve reference' errors, ensure all identifiers are valid and visible in the current scope.
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by tracing and fixing the first unresolved reference on the same line.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes, not component type scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assignments in implementation scope must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
